<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace PHPUnit\Architecture\Asserts\Methods; use PhpParser\Node; use PHPUnit\Architecture\Asserts\Inheritance\ObjectInheritanceDescription; use PHPUnit\Architecture\Asserts\Methods\Elements\MethodDescription; use PHPUnit\Architecture\Asserts\Methods\Elements\ObjectMethods; use PHPUnit\Architecture\Elements\ObjectDescription; use PHPUnit\Architecture\Services\ServiceContainer; /** * Describe object methods */ abstract class ObjectMethodsDescription extends ObjectInheritanceDescription { public ObjectMethods $methods; public static function make(string $path): ?self { /** @var ObjectDescription|null $description */ $description = parent::make($path); if ($description === null) { return null; } /** @var Node\Stmt\ClassMethod[] $methods */ $methods = ServiceContainer::$nodeFinder->findInstanceOf($description->stmts, Node\Stmt\ClassMethod::class); $description->methods = new ObjectMethods( array_map(static function (Node\Stmt\ClassMethod $classMethod) use ($description): MethodDescription { return MethodDescription::make($description, $classMethod); }, $methods) ); return $description; } }
